ai_training.title: AI Training Programs
ai_training.subtitle: Master the future of intelligent systems

courses.label: Fundamentals
courses.name: AI & Machine Learning Foundations
courses.description: Build a rock-solid understanding of neural networks, supervised/unsupervised learning, and model evaluation from the ground up.

courses.label: Prompt Craft
courses.name: Advanced Prompt Engineering
courses.description: Master the art of communicating with LLMs. Chain-of-thought, few-shot, system prompts, and guardrails for production AI.

courses.label: Agents
courses.name: Agentic AI & Multi-Agent Systems
courses.description: Design autonomous AI agent swarms that plan, execute, and self-correct. Build with LangChain, CrewAI, and custom orchestrators.

courses.label: RAG
courses.name: RAG Architecture & Vector Databases
courses.description: Build production-grade Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipelines with Pinecone, Weaviate, and ChromaDB.

courses.label: No-Code AI
courses.name: n8n & Make.com AI Automation
courses.description: Automate entire business workflows with n8n and Make.com. Connect AI models to 1000+ apps without writing code.

courses.label: Voice
courses.name: Vapi Voice AI Development
courses.description: Build conversational voice agents with Vapi. Real-time speech-to-text, custom voices, and telephony integration.

services.label: Assessment
services.name: Network Security Audit
services.description: Comprehensive vulnerability assessment of your entire network topology. Penetration testing, firewall review, and detailed remediation report.

services.label: SD-WAN
services.name: SD-WAN Deployment & Migration
services.description: Full SD-WAN design, deployment, and migration from traditional WAN. Multi-site orchestration with failover and QoS policies.

services.label: Security
services.name: Zero Trust Network Architecture
services.description: Design and implement a zero-trust security model. Identity-based access, micro-segmentation, and continuous verification.

services.label: Cloud
services.name: Cloud Infrastructure Migration
services.description: Seamless migration of on-premise workloads to AWS, GCP, or Azure. Full CI/CD pipeline setup and monitoring.

services.label: Firewall
services.name: Managed Firewall Service
services.description: 24/7 managed firewall with real-time threat detection, automatic rule updates, and monthly security reports.

services.label: Backbone
services.name: Fiber & BGP Routing Design
services.description: Physical fiber backbone design with BGP/OSPF routing. Multi-path redundancy and traffic engineering for maximum uptime.
